selection_rule: Cleanest UVAI from a date with surface-state representative of test scenes (not pure UVAI minimization).

primary.rationale: Post-construction-active surface; matches test-scene surface state at construction-active AOI.

Pool B rank 1; midway through KSP construction evolution; matches surface state of post-demolition test scenes (10 of 11). Pool A candidates (2020-2021) show pre-demolition Riyadh Air Base — surface state matches only 1 test scene.

sensitivity.rationale: More developed surface; catches threshold sensitivity to surface evolution within KSP construction window.

king_salman_park.bbox_note: References computed on tightened 16.6 km² bbox (committed 119db1b). Earlier 29.93 km² bbox candidates superseded.

diriyah_gate.sensitivity_note: None needed — AOI is surface-stable across study window.
